offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes compliance issues. We convert raw expense reports into compliant accounting entries instead of manual entry of expense reports into accounting software.
problem: inaccurate accounting entries due to manual processing of raw expense reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry support on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
